name: Main Street Financial Services Corp.
summary: Main Street Financial Services Corp. operates as the financial services holding company for Main Street Bank Corp. that provides various banking products and services. It offers checking and savings accounts; and various loans, such as commercial, real estate, installment, consumer, and residential loans, as well as personal lines of credit. The company also provides other services, including wire transfers, ATM, business money market, Internet banking, safe deposit boxes, non-profit accounts, and renaissance services of CDs. It serves individuals and business clients through branch offices located in the Elm Grove section of Wheeling, Wellsburg, and Moundsville, West Virginia. Main Street Financial Services Corp. was founded in 2001 and is based in Wheeling, West Virginia.
